misses: triax: no login-free manufacturer STEP found. Trompeter/Cinch (Bel Fuse) CAD library is a SnapMagic embed (banned portal); Pomona triax adapters offer only PDF datasheets (their 3D models live on 3DContentCentral, banned); LEMO/Fischer CAD requires CADENAS PARTcommunity registration; Accu-Glass carries triax cable but no triax connector STEP.

minisas_hd_oculink: not obtained. Molex part-detail pages ('not formally published') expose no CAD; TE.com and Amphenol-CS block automated access (403) and TE DocumentDelivery CVM guess returned 500; Amphenol RF/CS 3D models are behind the MyARF login; no alternative vendor with direct STEP found.

note_amphenolrf: Amphenol RF (N/TNC/SMB originally requested from them) gates all 3D models behind MyARF account login (asset URLs 403 + redirect to login); items 6-8 were fulfilled from Wurth Elektronik instead.
note_schurter: Schurter IEC C20 CAD is served via an embedded CADENAS iframe (registration-gated); item 14 fulfilled from Qualtek instead.
note_molex_minifit: Molex 'Download 3D Model' unavailable without login for 39281043/0039012040; item 21 fulfilled with the equivalent Wurth WR-MPC4 4.2 mm housing.

uhf_pl259: no login-free STEP found. Radiall makes UHF (R155.003/005.000) but publishes no CAD for the series (S3 has only the datasheet PDF); Telegaertner (J01040 series), TME, Keystone, Farnell/CPC, L-com, Pasternack and Amphenol RF all block automated access (403) or gate CAD behind login; Adam Tech UHF (RF9-01-D-01-50) has datasheet only, no 3D model.

triax_update_2026-07: still no login-free STEP. Radiall BNC-TRX R266 parts (R266.010/260/403.000) have no STEP on the radiall-files S3 bucket; Intelliconnect triax (TRB/TRT, e.g. 0131-P1NN-417-100N) product pages offer PDF datasheets only; Trompeter/Cinch and Pomona remain banned portals; LEMO/Fischer gated.

ieee1394_firewire_6pin: not obtained. EDAC 693 series delisted from edac.net (obsolete); Molex host unreachable; Keystone (keyelco.com) and L-com block automated access; Assmann A-IEE-DIP 3D link redirects to TraceParts (banned); Adam Tech has no 1394 line; Kycon site has broken TLS chain and no confirmed 1394 series.
